title: My Lips Betray
writer: Doris Anderson, S.N. Behrman, Guy Bolton
actors: Lilian Harvey, John Boles, El Brendel
plot: In a make-believe, mittleuropean kingdom, a vivacious but dim country girl sings in a beer garden for her rent money. Meanwhile, the King is facing bankruptcy for his little nation, unless he marries a rich but undesirable Queen o...
